Starting from venue 17 (Pacha Ibiza) as required, the next best venue to maximize revenue while minimizing travel cost is venue 18 (Amnesia), which is geographically close in Ibiza, Spain. Both venues have high estimated revenues (808,710 and 772,198 respectively) and similar operating costs, ensuring a profitable and efficient tour within the maximum of 2 venues.

Starting from the required start venue 65 in Los Angeles, I selected venues geographically clustered in Los Angeles to minimize travel cost. Venues 43 and 47 are both in Los Angeles with high estimated revenues (1,670,466 and 1,712,613 respectively) and moderate operating costs, making them profitable choices. Venue 72 is also in Los Angeles, adding additional revenue while maintaining geographic proximity. This cluster maximizes revenue while minimizing travel costs and stays within the max_venues limit of 10.

Starting from the required start venue 65 in Los Angeles, I selected venues geographically clustered in Los Angeles to minimize travel costs. Venues 43 and 47 are both in Los Angeles with high estimated revenues (1,789,785 and 1,834,942.5 respectively) and moderate operating costs, maximizing revenue potential. Venue 72 is also in Los Angeles, adding additional revenue while keeping the cluster tight. This selection of four venues balances maximizing revenue and minimizing travel cost within the maximum of five venues.
